overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime exploration of Night City. The player character circles a massive golden winged statue in a neon-lit plaza before journeying through urban streets, wetlands, and dense palm groves to reach the illuminated North Oak sign on a hillside. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with cyberpunk neon lighting contrasting against natural terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with monumental winged statue

agents.ego_description: circling the golden statue in the plaza, observing the surrounding neon-lit skyscrapers and palm trees

entered.detail: large copper-colored statue of a winged humanoid figure with outstretched wings on a stepped platform
tall modern buildings with illuminated billboards and colorful neon signage
tall palm trees surrounding the plaza perimeter
circular paved stone platform at the base of the statue

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, centered on a massive golden winged statue. The player circles the monument while neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards glow in the background. Palm trees line the plaza edges, and the ground is paved with stone tiles reflecting the city lights.

events.description: exiting the urban plaza and approaching the roadside with the North Oak sign visible on the hillside
turning away from the statue to face the road and hillside sign

agents.ego_description: walking away from the plaza toward the roadside, approaching the illuminated North Oak sign on the hill

entered.detail: large illuminated white sign spelling 'North Oak' mounted on a hillside
paved two-lane road with yellow dividing lines
vehicle parked on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the plaza and approaches a roadside, where the large illuminated 'North Oak' sign becomes visible on the hillside ahead. A parked car sits on the right side of the asphalt road, and the neon skyscrapers fade into the left background as the camera turns toward the natural terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wetland grass area with standing water

events.description: entering grassy wetland terrain with shallow puddles reflecting the city lights

agents.ego_description: traversing through wet grass and shallow water toward the hillside, with the North Oak sign visible in the distance

entered.detail: wet grass and muddy ground with patches of vegetation
reflective puddles and standing water on the ground surface

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the road and enters a wetland area with tall grass and shallow puddles reflecting the distant city lights. The North Oak sign remains visible ahead on the hillside, while the urban environment fades into the background. The terrain is damp and uneven, transitioning from urban to natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense palm grove beneath illuminated hillside sign

events.description: entering dense palm grove at the base of the North Oak sign
beginning steep ascent through vegetation toward the sign support structure

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill through dense palm trees and underbrush directly beneath the illuminated North Oak sign

entered.detail: thick cluster of palm trees and tropical vegetation surrounding the path
metal framework and scaffolding supporting the large North Oak letters

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dense palm grove, climbing uphill toward the massive North Oak sign. The vegetation becomes thick and enclosed, blocking much of the sky, while the illuminated sign looms larger overhead. Metal support structures for the sign become visible through the trees as the ascent continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban plaza into a dense, natural hillside landscape. It begins by circling a massive golden winged statue amidst glowing skyscrapers and digital billboards that reflect off the stone tiles of the plaza. As the camera leaves the city center, the urban skyline fades into the background and the view opens toward a roadside where a parked car sits beside the illuminated North Oak sign looming on a distant hill. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the asphalt and enters a damp wetland, moving through tall grass and shallow puddles that mirror the receding city lights. Finally, the terrain transforms into a thick palm grove, with the camera climbing uphill through enclosed vegetation toward the massive sign and its metal support structures.
